ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_type" INTEGER /* Type of the event (foreign key to event_types) */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_location" TEXT /* Location where the event is held */,
  "event_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the event */,
  "event_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the event */,
  "event_fee" TEXT /* Registration fee for the event */,
  "event_prize_pool" TEXT /* Total prize pool for the event */,
  "event_status" TEXT /* Current status of the event (e.g., Upcoming, Ongoing, Completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_event_type FOREIGN KEY ("event_type") REFERENCES event_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event where the performance was recorded */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player whose performance is tracked */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the player in the event */,
  "game_wins" INTEGER /* Number of games won by the player */,
  "victory_points" REAL /* Victory points accumulated by the player */,
  "total_points" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the player */,
  "final_score" INTEGER /* Final score achieved by the player */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Player's rating based on the performance */,
  "kills" INTEGER /* Number of kills made by the player */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists by the player */,
  "damage_dealt" INTEGER /* Total damage dealt by the player */,
  "damage_taken" INTEGER /* Total damage taken by the player */,
  "healing_done" INTEGER /* Total healing done by the player */,
  "healing_received" INTEGER /* Total healing received by the player */,
  "mvps" INTEGER /* Number of Most Valuable Player awards */,
  "elo_change" INTEGER /* Change in ELO rating after the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the player belongs to */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the player */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the player */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the player joined the organization */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Short bio of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "captain" TEXT /* Captain of the team */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the team represents */,
  "founded_date" TEXT /* Date the team was founded */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the team's website */,
  "social_media_url" TEXT /* URL of the team's social media page */,
  "total_winnings" TEXT /* Total winnings of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  "max_players" INTEGER /* Maximum number of players allowed in the event */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the event (e.g., 1 day, 3 days) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player whose rating is recorded */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event associated with the rating */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was assigned */,
  "rating_score" REAL /* Score of the player's rating */,
  "previous_rating" REAL /* Player's rating before the event */,
  "rating_change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the rating change (e.g., Performance, Penalty) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event being logged */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made to the event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., Update, Delete, Create) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_logs_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, player, coach) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the role */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the role was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission entry */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role associated with the permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., view_events, edit_performance) */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the permission */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
